subcodes.first_line: O beloved friend! Thou hast chanted the verses of thy thanksgiving unto God, inasmuch as He hath guided thee to tread the path of divine guidance and revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الحبیب قد رتلت ایات شکرک للله بما وفقک علی السلوک فی سبیل الهدی و کشف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
